section.title: Metropolis: London
section.summary: A vocabulary guide covering the history, trade, urban development, and industrial aspects of London as a major city.

questions.prompt: What is the meaning of the expression 'in plain sight'?
questions.explanation: According to the vocabulary list, 'in plain sight' translates to 'à la vue de tous'.

questions.explanation: The text defines 'the height of the British Empire' as 'l’apogée de l’Empire britannique'.
